message:
feat: update VPS recommendations for multi-agent workloads

- Remove Hetzner (has waiting period for new accounts)
- Recommend 32GB RAM for running 10+ Claude Code agents
- Update provider guides with Contabo as primary recommendation
- Add Claude Max ($200/mo) and GPT Pro ($200/mo) subscription info
- Add SimplerGuide to status-check wizard step

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -238,36 +238,107 @@ export default function RentVPSPage() { With a VPS, your AI assistants can work even when you're asleep! + +
+

⚡ This matters a lot!

+

+ Each AI coding agent (like Claude Code) uses about 2GB of RAM when running. + To get the full power of this approach, you'll want to run 10+ agents + simultaneously. That's 20GB+ just for the agents, plus room for your + development tools and databases. +

+
+
    +
  • + 16GB RAM — Bare minimum. Can run 3-5 agents. Good for testing. +
    • +
  • + 32GB RAM — Sweet spot. Run 10+ agents comfortably. Recommended! +
    • +
  • + 64GB+ RAM — Power user mode. Run 20+ agents with headroom. +
    • +
+ + + +

+ To get the FULL benefit of this approach with many parallel agents, you'll + also need subscriptions to AI services. This is optional — you can start + smaller and scale up! +

+
+
+

Claude Max — $200/month

+

+ Unlimited Claude Code usage. For serious multi-agent workflows, consider + 2 accounts ($400/month) to maximize parallel capacity. +

+
+
+

GPT Pro — $200/month

+

+ Access to OpenAI's Codex and o1 models. Great for redundancy and + comparing outputs from different AI systems. +

+
+
+

Total for full setup:

+

+ VPS ($40) + Claude Max x2 ($400) + GPT Pro ($200) = ~$640/month +

+ This sounds like a lot, but if it helps you build and ship faster, + it pays for itself quickly! +

+
+
+

+ Starting small? Just get a VPS ($35-40) and one Claude Pro + subscription ($20). You can scale up as you see results! +

+ +

- All three providers we recommend are good choices. Here's a simple guide: + Both providers we recommend are great. Here's how to choose:

  • - Hetzner — Best for most people. Clean interface, fair prices, - popular with developers. We recommend this if you're unsure. + Contabo — Our top recommendation! Best specs for the price. + Their 32GB RAM VPS is only ~$35/month. Interface is basic but functional. + Instant activation — no waiting.
  • - OVH — Great if you're in Europe or want European data centers. - Slightly more complex signup process. -
    • -
  • - Contabo — Cheapest option for high specs. Good if budget is - a concern, but their interface is a bit dated. + OVH — Good alternative with excellent support. Slightly more + expensive but more polished interface. Great EU data centers. Also instant + activation.
- +
- - Click on "Hetzner" above, or go to{" "} - - hetzner.com/cloud + + Click on "Contabo" above, or go to{" "} + + contabo.com/en/vps - + + Look for "Cloud VPS L" — it has 6 vCPU, 32GB RAM, and 400GB storage + for about $35/month. Click "Configure" or "Order". + + + +
    +
  • Region: Choose closest to you (US or EU)
    • +
  • Storage: Keep the default SSD option
    • +
  • Image: Select "Ubuntu 24.04" or newer
    • +
+ + + Click "Sign up" or "Register". You'll need:
  • An email address

This is normal — - you'll only be charged for what you use. + + Contabo accepts credit cards and PayPal. You'll be charged for the + first month upfront.

- Expected cost: Around $30-60/month depending on - the plan you choose. You can cancel anytime. + Tip: Monthly billing is fine to start. You can switch to + annual billing later for a small discount. - - Once your account is verified and payment is set up, you're ready - for the next step where we'll actually create the VPS. + + Review your order and complete checkout. Contabo activates servers + quickly — usually within minutes!

  • - vCPU (4-8) — The "brain" of the computer. More = faster. - 4 is minimum, 8 is comfortable. + vCPU (6-8) — The "brain" of the computer. More = faster. + 6 is comfortable, 8 is great.
  • - RAM (8-16 GB) — Short-term memory. More = can do more things - at once. 8GB minimum, 16GB is better. + RAM (32 GB) — Short-term memory. This is crucial for running + multiple AI agents! 32GB lets you run 10+ agents comfortably.
  • - Storage (100GB+ SSD) — Long-term storage for files and programs. - SSD means it's fast. 100GB is plenty to start. + Storage (200GB+ SSD) — Long-term storage for files, databases, + and AI model caches. SSD means it's fast. 200GB is a good starting point.

Pick one, - sign up, and you can always switch later if needed. The setup process - is similar for all of them. + Start with Contabo's Cloud VPS L for the best balance of + price and power. At ~$35/month for 32GB RAM, it's hard to beat. Both + Contabo and OVH activate servers instantly — no waiting period!
